label: DOS box
summary: A black terminal block on <pre>, with an optional C:\> title strip.
era: Terminal cosplay from the textfiles web, black screen, gray Courier, ASCII banners, and cheat tables at the C:\> prompt.

classes.name: rs-dos
classes.role: the terminal block on <pre>: black bg, gray mono, 2px sunken border

classes.name: rs-dos__title
classes.role: the C:\> strip above the block

a11y: Built on <pre>, so spacing and reading order survive exactly as typed. Give large ASCII art a short text alternative nearby, screen readers read every slash.
